title: pisum clymenum
intro: Pisum clymenum, also known as garden pea or chickling pea, is a climbing legume plant native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Pisum clymenum include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, making it useful in treating urinary issues and kidney stones. The health benefits of consuming Pisum clymenum include its high content of protein, fiber, and vitamins, which can help lower cholesterol levels and improve overall digestive health. Pisum clymenum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote kidney function and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections.
